name: Consortia & Tender Marketing Scheme
benefit_description: Enlistment of the Unit for participating in Government/Private tenders. Benefit of 0.5% in service charges  to consortium members.
details: Promotion of the product of Micro and Small Entrepreneurs is one of the major objectives of the Corporation. In the present competitive scenario a need has been felt to facilitate Micro and Small Enterprises to market their goods / services individually or collectively through ‘Consortium’. Accordingly, the scheme for promoting the products of the MSEs has been reviewed in 2011 & named as “Consortia and Tender Marketing Scheme”. This scheme will especially help the units to enlist themselves for
eligibility_text: Micro & Small Enterprises registered with NSIC under its Single Point Registration Scheme (SPRS). Or, Micro & Small Enterprises who apply to get themselves registered with NSIC under the SPRS along with all required documents in terms of the scheme. Their factory/unit should be inspected before filing of tender in terms of the Tender Marketing Scheme.
